params.dx: The amount of input coin to exchange.
params.i: The index of the input coin (0 = ETH, 1 = stETH).
params.j: The index of the output coin (0 = ETH, 1 = stETH).
params.minDy: The minimum amount of output coin to receive.

returns.dy: The actual amount of output coin received.

params.i: The index of the input coin.
params.j: The index of the output coin.

returns.dy: The expected amount of output coin.

exchange(int128,int128,uint256,uint256).notice: Exchange between two tokens in the pool.

get_dy(int128,int128,uint256).notice: Get the amount of output coin for a given input.
